name: noas
description: Nostr Authentication Server with NIP-05 verification

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:watch: NODE_ENV=test node --test --watch src/auth.test.js src/db/users.test.js src/db/nip46.test.js src/nip46.test.js
scripts.test:unit: NODE_ENV=test node --test src/auth.test.js src/db/users.test.js src/db/nip46.test.js src/nip46.test.js
